summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bhubezi app modifications. Successfully verified most requested features including driver signup improvements, welcome pages, marshal dashboard changes, and UI layout updates.

integration_issues.issue: Difficulty clicking comms buttons in automated testing - buttons may have overlay interception

passed_tests: Driver signup: Brand dropdown shows Toyota Quantum, Nissan Impendulo, Mercedes Sprinter, custom option
Driver signup: Color picker with 10 preset colors and custom HTML color picker
Passenger signup: Shows 'SHO! WE LIVE!' welcome page with 'Welcome to the Jozi Network'
Marshal signup: Shows 'SHO! WE LIVE!' welcome page with 'Welcome to the Jozi Network'
Marshal Dashboard: BROADCAST ALERT section successfully removed
Marshal Dashboard: Capacity buttons use short text (EMPTY, MOVING, HALF, FULL, OVER) - no overflow
Marshal Dashboard: UPDATE STATUS button functions correctly
Onboarding flow works end-to-end for all user types
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Consider improving comms button clickability by adding data-testid attributes or adjusting z-index/positioning to prevent overlay interception during automated testing.
